animation.init_id: DFS ready: showing cell IDs. Start: {{start}}, End: {{end}}
animation.init_dist: Initialize all distances to ∞, preparing for DFS
animation.start_settle: Start node {{start}} is settled in the Stack
animation.explore_some: Explore neighbors of {{curr}}, found unstacked nodes
animation.explore_none: Explore neighbors of {{curr}}, all neighbors already in stack or visited

animation.grid_blocked: Start or End is blocked by a wall, cannot start
